dailySummary.top_activities: working on SelfTrack (4h 0m) · playing Total War (30m) · taking a bath (notepad note left on screen) (30m)
dailySummary.takeaway: 4h on SelfTrack tooling but only 15m on MBTI Oracle and 0 TikTok shipped — zero motion on the actual revenue/acquisition levers. Tomorrow morning: film one Simple Rizz hook before opening the dashboard repo.
dailySummary.note:
Today I created a self-tracking system, calling it "Life of Sun".
Basically the idea is to have my AI agent take a picture of me on the screen every 15 minutes while the PC is on. So I can better analyze where my hours are going and where I could optimize my time so I can maximize ROI on how I spend my time.

I got the inspiration from a podcast from Marc Andreessen (I think that was who it was), who had a similar set up for sleep.

I hope I can find good insights into optimizing ROI on my time.
